Actually the greatest fan game of all time. I love it because there’s the OG maps, it’s not a bad update to stay in, you have 90,000 shiny rocks, and you get whopping 4 mod menus and songs!!! You can also get the stick, the content creator badge, and the admin badge. Pretty good game overall.

I was wondering if I could be a mom because I will try to stop people if they are flagging or if they are not following the rules of the game and I also was helping out a new player to learn how to play this game. In all I was hoping that I would become a moderator and make this a better game for the community 😁👍

Also I really like this game and I recommend it to everyone. This is one of the most entertaining VR game that I have.

I was just playing regurly after I got home from school and I had to get off and the next day I open up the app I come out of stump and it won't let me join any lobby's I already uninstalled it and reinstalled it but it didn't work but overall its really fun but the fly spammers are so annoying but I have 2 controllers now so I'ma troll them.

So for yall realising you can’t join any lobbies anymore, basically what happened is that the servers are down and are getting fixed as soon as possible. 

Note: join the discord to get more information about the situation.

I used to love this game and play it every day until my game started not letting me go in publics until a few days after that the game got banned from store due to copyright issues. I knew it. The game got shut down but I still used to like it.

My friend convinced me to get this game, and it's a really fun game, but in a recent update they really goofed up. It is now impossible to use mods without constantly leaving and rejoining. Because the same button you use to open mods is now the same button you use to activate mods. So if you activate invisible mod, when you try to disable it you can't because you can't see your hand. Please for the love of God fix it. Also bring back the emotes.

ever since i got this game I have been addicted to it and its really fun to hang out and you get the finger painter the stick and more but what I have noticed is that there's alot of mod abusers and toxic players and If I were the own I would immediately add more moderators

And development could I get mod cause I want to make project apex a better place so please make me mod and trust me this community will change

Hey! As you know, we all love playing Gorilla Tag, and I’m really passionate about becoming a moderator. I want to help the community grow, make the game more enjoyable for everyone, and ensure it stays a fun, positive space—not like a chaotic COD lobby. I’m also working on developing this and other games, and I’d love the chance to contribute more. Let’s connect—join a code or add me on VR so we can chat more. No Discord needed. Thanks!

The.goated.guy
